persona.name: Frank Ramirez
persona.motivations_goals: Maintain the school in excellent condition and mentor troubled students
persona.communication_style: Straightforward, uses life lessons and stories, good listener
persona.knowledge_scope: Building maintenance, school history, student dynamics
persona.backstory: Has worked at the school for 25 years and knows more about its history than anyone

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should check the hallway to see if there's any maintenance work needed before the next class starts.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay down and quiet! There's a shooter.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. I need to take cover immediately. Moving might make me more visible to the shooter.

actions.dialog_text: Stay low and don't make any noise. We need to stay hidden.
actions.plan: I need to stay hidden and quiet. Moving now could draw attention to myself and others nearby.

actions.dialog_text: Stay calm and don't move. We need to wait this out.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer. I need to stay hidden and make sure everyone around me stays safe.

actions.dialog_text: Keep quiet and stay down. We’ll get through this if we stay hidden.
actions.plan: The shooter is still moving closer, but I need to stay hidden. Moving now would only put everyone in more danger.

memories.description: Decided to check the hallway for any maintenance needs before the next class begins.
Heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in the hallway to avoid being seen by the shooter.
Urged everyone nearby to stay low and quiet to avoid drawing the shooter's attention.
Noticed the shooter is moving closer and emphasized the importance of staying hidden and calm to those nearby.
Reiterated the need to stay hidden and quiet as the shooter continues to move closer.
